title: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K
snippet: The FY2025 10-K describes the AI-native CrowdStrike Falcon platform, Charlotte AI as generative AI for security operations, securing generative AI workloads, AI adoption as a demand driver, and AI-related risks including adversarial AI, regulation, compliance, and rapid AI evolution.

title: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. Q3 FY2026 Form 10-Q
snippet: The Q3 FY2026 10-Q updates the period ended October 31, 2025, repeats the AI-native Falcon platform framing, and discloses the September 26, 2025 Pangea acquisition for AI Detection and Response solutions.
